You gain a +4 bonus on checks made to avoid being bull rushed, overrun, or tripped. Furthermore, as long as you carry a two-handed weapon, you are treated as if you had readied that weapon against any creature that charges you (and thus it deals double damage if your attack is successHexbands Shadow maniple Strongarm bracers Vambraces of warding

Anklet of translocation.description:
When activated, you can instantly teleport (with no chance of error) up to 10 feet. The new space must be within line of sight and line of effect. You cannot teleport into a space occupied by another creature or a solid object.

Functions two times per day.

Incarnum boots.description:
Matches the Feet chakra (feet slot). While worn, adds 1 to the essentia capacity of any soulmeld occupying or bound to the chakra this focus matches (up to your Constitution bonus). Wearing it does not prevent binding a soulmeld to that chakra.

Chakra bind (any): While bound to its chakra, soulmelds on that chakra can't be unshaped except by you, and essentia invested can't be lost or drained except during normal reallocation.

Sandals Of Springing.description: The laces of these well-made sandals are bound at the calf by a silver clasp inset with a large, smooth, hemispherical blue crystal. Sandals of springing grant you a +10 enhancement bonus on Jump checks.

Sandals Of Sprinting.description: These lightweight sandals are soled with tanned cheetah hide, and the straps are made of dried, braided sinew. When you activate sandals of sprinting, you gain a +30-foot enhancement bonus to your land speed (to a maximum of twice your normal speed) until the start of your next turn. This ability functions three times per day.

Vanguard treads.description: These massive boots have spiked, treaded soles and look large enough to fi t a heavily armored ogre. A row of inset amethysts runs around the top cuff. Vanguard treads provide you with superior traction and stability, which provides the following effects: • You can move through diffi cult terrain (such as rubble, undergrowth, steep slopes, stairs, or snow) at normal speed and without suffering any other impairment. • You are unaffected by slippery ice, wet stones, or other surfaces where traction is a problem. • You gain a +8 bonus on attempts to resist bull rushes and a +4 bonus on grapple checks to resist a grapple attempt if that grapple would move you into another square. Areas that have been magically manipulated to impede movement (such as by an entangle spell) still affect you, as do water, quicksand, and other nonsolid surfaces. You still have to slow down for narrow paths requiring Balance checks and for surfaces steep enough to require Climb checks. If the terrain deals damage (such as the burning ground on the Elemental Plane of Fire), you still take that damage. The massive spikes and treads on the soles of vanguard treads leave a distinctive trail. Anyone following you gains a +10 circumstance bonus on Survival and Search checks made to track you. Lore: Ancient giants made the fi rst vanguard treads to aid their scouts in navigating diffi cult terrain and hazards (Knowledge [arcana] DC 15).

Blessed Book.description: Spells take 1/4 page each for wizard spellbook.

Broom of Flying.description: Fly 40 ft. or 30 ft. with passenger.

Carpet of Flying, 10 ft. by 10 ft..description: Fly 40 ft. carrying up to 800 lb.

Carpet of Flying, 5 ft. by 10 ft..description: Fly 40 ft. carrying up to 400 lb.

Carpet of Flying, 5 ft. by 5 ft..description: Fly 40 ft. carrying up to 200 lb.

Carpet of Flying, 6 ft. by 9 ft..description: Fly 40 ft. carrying up to 600 lb.

Cube of Frost Resistance.description: Major ring of energy resistance (cold) effect in 10-ft. radius.

Cubic Gate.description: Open a gate or transport self and those around you to one of six planes

Darkskull.description: Continuous deeper darkness and silence in 20-ft. radius.

Decanter of Endless Water.description: Produces fresh, salt, or hot water.

Deck of Illusions.description: Generates illusory creatures from drawn cards.

Efficient Quiver.description: Holds bows, polearms, and javelins with reduced weight.

Efreeti Bottle.description: Contains imprisoned efreeti who (usually) serves character each time released

Elixir of Sneaking.description: +10 competence on Move Silently for 1 hour.

Golem Manual, Greater Stone.description: Instructions to craft greater stone golem.

Handy Haversack.description: Extradimensional storage; retrieve item as move action.

Incense of Meditation.description: Double effect duration for prepared spells.

Ioun Stone, Clear Spindle.description: Sustains wearer without food or water.

Ioun Stone, Pale Green Prism.description: +1 competence bonus on attack rolls, saves, checks, and DCs.

Ioun Stone, Pearly White Spindle.description: Regenerate 1 point of damage per hour.

Ioun Stone, Vibrant Purple Prism.description: Stores spell levels as ring of spell storing.

Iron Flask.description: 1/day capture extraplanar creature and force it to serve you for 1 hour

Mirror of Life Trapping.description: Extradimensionally imprisons up to fifteen creatures who look at it 200

Mirror of Mental Prowess.description: Create various divination spell effects, use as a transport portal

Stone of Alarm.description: Mental alarm when Tiny or larger creature touches warded area.

Stone of Good Luck (Luckstone).description: +1 luck bonus on all saving throws, ability checks, and skill checks.

Wand of Enemy Detection.description: Not a wondrous item; listed for reference only.

Aberrant sphere.description: Deals 4d6 damage and confuses creatures in a 10-foot radius 1/day.

Absorbing shield.description: +1 heavy steel shield, once per two days can disintegrate an object it touches

Acid.description: resistance, greater Absorbs 30 points of acid damage per attack

Adamantine battleaxe.description: Masterwork adamantine battleaxe that overcomes DR/adamantine.

Adamantine dagger.description: Masterwork adamantine dagger that overcomes DR/adamantine.

Alchemist’s fire.description: A sticky, adhesive fluid that ignites on impact, dealing fire damage.

Anstruth harp.description: A magical harp that grants a +2 competence bonus on Perform checks.

Antitoxin.description: Grants a +5 alchemical bonus on Fortitude saves against poison for 1 hour.

Arcane thieves’ tools.description: Grants a +5 competence bonus on Disable Device and Open Lock checks.

Armor of the fallen leavesR.description: Obad-Hai: +1 wild breastplate plus relic powers

Aroma of curdled death.description: Creates a 20-foot-radius cloud that nauseates creatures 1/day.
